complaint_text: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription and support hasn't responded in a week.
resolution: Refunded the duplicate charge within 3 business days and applied a one-month service credit for the delayed response.

complaint_text: My package was supposed to arrive 5 days ago and tracking hasn't updated since it left the warehouse.
resolution: Issued a full shipping refund and expedited a replacement shipment at no extra cost.

complaint_text: The blender I bought stopped working after two uses and smells like burning plastic.
resolution: Processed a full refund and flagged the product batch for quality control review.

complaint_text: Someone accessed my account and changed my password without my permission.
resolution: Locked the account, forced a password reset, reviewed account activity logs, and confirmed no unauthorized purchases were made.

complaint_text: I've called customer service four times about my billing issue and keep getting transferred with no resolution.
resolution: Escalated to a senior support specialist who resolved the billing discrepancy in a single call and issued a service credit for the inconvenience.

complaint_text: I can't log into my account even after resetting my password three times.
resolution: Identified a cached session bug, manually cleared the account lock, and verified successful login with the customer.

complaint_text: I'm being charged for a premium plan I never signed up for.
resolution: Downgraded the account to the correct plan, refunded all premium charges, and added a billing alert preference to the account.
